bugs.description: Rested logic isn't working correctly, which causes no increase in rested values on daily reset. This issue is being actively investigated.

encounters.db sync may toggle all gates to 'completed' state even if only gate 1 was completed. This is a known issue with the encounters.db sync logic and is being actively investigated. The workaround is to not get jailed and fully complete the raid in one go.

Gold-Logs not updating in real-time due to locked database file. It takes the app a few minutes to detect the change and update the gold logs accordingly. The workaround is to simply wait a few minutes after completing an encounter before expecting them to appear in the app.

App may show 'Update available' notification before the latest version is actually available for download. This is due to the update check running before the new release assets are fully propagated on GitHub. The workaround is to simply ignore the notification and check for updates again after a few minutes, at which point the latest version should be correctly detected and available for download.
Raid difficulty settings not always saving correctly > workaround: change difficulty per gate in child-rows if master-row shows "mixed" state unintentionally
